payments.title: Set your consultation prices
payments.description: Patients will pay the price you set. Esthetic Match takes a 15% platform fee, and the remaining amount goes to your connected Stripe account.
payments.onlineDescription: The price patients pay for online consultations.
payments.inClinicDescription: The price patients pay for appointments at your clinic.
payments.secureDescription: The price patients will pay to send you a direct message including text and photos only — in order to ask a medical-related question and receive a professional opinion before booking an in-person consultation. This is a more progressive way to reassure patients before they take the step of booking a physical appointment, while also helping improve the qualification of your patient base. The chat is encrypted and medically compliant. “Under the standard plan, a 15% platform fee applies (see terms and conditions).

paymentPrices.title: Set your consultation prices
paymentPrices.description: Patients will pay the price you set. Esthetic Match takes a 15% platform fee, and the remaining amount goes to your connected Stripe account.

inClinic.title: In-clinic consultation

online.title: Online consultation
online.description: The price patients pay for online consultations.

stripe.title: Secure Stripe payments
stripe.description: Stripe handles payment collection, doctor payouts, and card processing. You will be redirected to Stripe to connect your account.

errors.invalidInClinicPrice: Please enter a valid in-clinic consultation price.
